# checkpointsase_enhanced_route_table (Data Source)

List the route table entries for a single `checkpointsase_enhanced_network`. Each entry maps a list of subnets to one or more tunnels. Use the `checkpointsase_enhanced_route_table` resource to manage entries; use this data source to read them.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_networks" "all" {}

# Route table for a single enhanced network.
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_route_table" "first" {
  network_id = data.checkpointsase_enhanced_networks.all.networks[0].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) The ID of the enhanced network to fetch the route table for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `routes` (List of Object) The list of route table entries for the given enhanced network. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routes))

<a id="nestedatt--routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routes`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `propagated` (Boolean)
- `subnets` (List of String)
- `tunnel_ids` (List of String)
